## Description



-

## Type of Change



- [ ] Feature — new functionality
- [ ] Bugfix — fixes an issue
- [ ] Hotfix — critical production fix
- [ ] Maintenance — dependency updates, CI/CD, infrastructure
- [ ] Chore — refactoring, cleanup, no behavior change
- [ ] Documentation — documentation only changes

## Testing



- [ ] Automated tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] No tests required — documentation or config only change

**Test details:**



## Checklist

- [ ] Builds cleanly
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
- [ ] Breaking changes documented (if applicable)
- [ ] Related ADRs/NFRs updated in `.docs/` (if applicable)
- [ ] `*_AGENTS.md` context files updated to reflect changes
